holdings.infoBox: VTWV is an equity ETF with a total of 1430 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 1.10%, EchoStar at 1.08%, Hut 8 at 0.75%, Viasat at 0.61%, and Coeur Mining at 0.61%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 2000 Value ETF (VTWV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 Value index. The fund is passively managed to hold US small-cap value stocks. Holdings are selected and weighted based on price-to-book-value. VTWV was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.
